This page documents a [[id:31C868B9-306E-4282-BA8C-07E647021B34][task]] in the [[id:D85E2B30-8C64-46DF-819D-B50D2E70B73C][Codegen unified model — org-mode migration]] story. It captures the goal, current status, acceptance, and any notes or results.

* Goal

=projects/ores.codegen/models/plantuml_er_model.json= is the
intermediate artefact of the ER-diagram codegen pipeline, written by
=plantuml_er_parse_sql.py= and read by =plantuml_er_generate.py= to
emit =ores_schema.puml=. It belongs to the *automated codegen route*
(see [[id:BA0E3273-DC4B-7CD4-447B-06227B7D09A8][MASD]] — Two codegen routes), where the model is derived from
already-generated artefacts rather than authored by a human.
=projects/ores.codegen/models/= is the authored-input tree; derived
models go to =build/output/= so they stay out of source.

Move the file to a build-output path, rely on the existing
=build/output= gitignore entry, and delete the check-in.

* Status

| Field        | Value                                  |
|--------------+----------------------------------------|
| State        | DONE                                   |
| Parent story | [[id:D85E2B30-8C64-46DF-819D-B50D2E70B73C][Codegen unified model — org-mode migration]] |
| Now          | Nothing.                               |
| Waiting on   | Nothing.                               |
| Next         | n/a                                    |
| Last touched | 2026-06-02                             |

* Acceptance

- =plantuml_er_generate.sh= writes the model to
  =build/output/codegen/plantuml_er_model.json= and reads it back
  from the same path. =build/output= is already gitignored (line 40
  of =.gitignore=), so no new ignore entry is needed.
- The existing
  =projects/ores.codegen/models/plantuml_er_model.json= check-in is
  removed.
- Running =projects/ores.codegen/plantuml_er_generate.sh= end-to-end
  succeeds: the parse stage writes the new path, the render stage
  picks it up, and =ores_schema.puml= regenerates as before.
